workflow.name: Product Requirements Approve
workflow.goal: Produce an approved PRD for workflow budget alerts with a technical review artifact and durable summary memory.

parameters.feature_request: Track token usage per workflow and alert operators when spend exceeds a configurable threshold.
parameters.user_context: Workspace operators managing multiple teams need early warning before costs exceed budget.
parameters.constraints: Use existing budget tracking surfaces. No new external billing systems.

memory.existing_context: Enterprise admins manage budgets and need concise operator guidance.
